name: @nervekit/desktop-shell
description: Electron packaging and desktop bridge shell for Nerve.
author: ThilinaTLM

scripts.build: pnpm run icons && tsc -b && node scripts/copy-preload.mjs
scripts.dev: pnpm -w build:workbench-runtime && pnpm --filter @nervekit/desktop-shell build && node scripts/start-electron.mjs
scripts.build:package: pnpm -w build:workbench-runtime && pnpm --filter @nervekit/desktop-shell build && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.package:linux: pnpm -w build:workbench-runtime && pnpm --filter @nervekit/desktop-shell build && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb rpm --publish never
